transcription.text: Getting ready to clean the bathroom, Mom? Yep. Introducing the Mr. Clean Magic Reach, a new extendable cleaning tool that makes cleaning the bathroom less of a workout. It comes with a flexible head and two different cleaning pads. The scrubbing pad tackles showers and cleans tubs with ease. The mopping pad cleans counters, floors, and hard-to-reach areas. Why reach? Get Mr. Clean Magic Reach.
